title: astragalus parnassi subsp. calabricus
intro: Astragalus parnassi subsp. calabricus, also known as the Calabric Astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The Calabric Astragalus is believed to offer several health benefits, such as enhancing immune function, reducing stress, and promoting cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall health and wellness.
